_meta.description: AbEngineCore data registry: versioning and traceability for all Tier-1, Tier-2, Tier-3 data sources
binding_standards: V1.2.0 Petization Standard (doc) — cohort release_id remains V1.0.0_Petization
_meta.governance_note: Rules are authored in standard documents; executable thresholds and lookups come from frozen tier_1_data files listed under version_mapping. Bidirectional: each tier_1 entry lists standards[]; each pipeline version lists depends_on file keys. Evolution: new clinical/data batches require registry bump + EVOLUTION_LOG entry; never silent threshold drift.

virtual_affinity_maturation.role: Virtual affinity maturation for VH/VL, VHH, protein-antigen, short peptide, and hapten/small-molecule projects
virtual_affinity_maturation.config_execution: core/structure/affinity_energy_toolkit.py + core/structure/structural_integrity_veto.py + core/structure/cdr_fingerprint_prior.py + core/cmc/sequence_liability_filter.py + core/structure/relax_and_clash_gate.py + scripts/affinity_energy_cli.py + scripts/run_pag1_vam_postfilter.py + scripts/run_pag1_vam_pipeline.py (unattended orchestrator: ala->saturation->stage4->audit[hard gate]->stage5->rebaseline; human-gated steps excluded) + config/vam_antigen_profile.json + tools/Boltz/colab/run_boltz2_pag1.ipynb
virtual_affinity_maturation.rules_from_data: V1.7 (2026-06-02, owner-approved alignment) canonicalizes three project-validated items over V1.6.1: (1) Stage-5 MM/GBSA MUST use per-site WT-self repack baseline (run_mmgbsa_selfref; ddg_corrected = dg(mut) - dg(WT_self@site)); asymmetric WT baseline forbidden (5-8 kcal/mol repack-relief artefact). (2) CHECK 6 fingerprint lookup MUST use IMGT-segmented CDR index (CDR1 27-38 / CDR2 56-65 / CDR3 105-117); union enumeration index forbidden; out-of-range = NOT_RUN. (3) CHECK 7 liability MUST resolve linear position via PDB chain_records; cdr_start+union_index forbidden. Single-frame MM/GBSA on flexible short peptide is corroboration-only (EvoEF2 primary + cross-tool sign agreement). HADDOCK3 optional/non-additive for <=30aa flexible-peptide Scenario A. V1.6 (additive over V1.5.2) adds CHECK 6 CDR Fingerprint Design Prior, CHECK 7 Sequence-Level CMC Liability Pre-Filter, CHECK 8 Relax + vdW Clash Gate. Routes VH/VL projects through AbRef-458 fingerprint (CDR_physchem_thresholds_v1.json) and VHH projects through VHH-71 (CDR_physchem_VHH71_v1.json with VHH-42 design-prior fallback). V1.6.1 patch fixes Stage 0 tool selection: Boltz-2 (MIT, commercial-safe) is PRIMARY; AF3 server is HARD-PROHIBITED for production; Chai-1 requires per-org license; short-peptide Scenario A imposes ipTM>=0.80 + PAE_interface<5.0 dual gate. Antigen-type adaptive parameters in config/vam_antigen_profile.json (schema 1.1.0). All V1.5.2 CHECK 1/2/4/5 logic and thresholds preserved unchanged.
data_must_exist: WT complex PDB with antibody chains
protein antigen chains or hapten HETATM resnames
tool registry entries for EvoEF2, ThermoMPNN, OpenMM MM/GBSA, Boltz-2
virtual_affinity_maturation.bidirectional_link: V1.6 standard §2 defines CHECK 6/7/8 modules; §2.4 (V1.6.1) defines Stage 0 tool selection and commercial-safe operation; §3 antigen profile JSON governs scenario A/B/C/D parameters; V1.5.2 CHECK 1/2/4/5 inherited via run_stage2_5. vam_antigen_profile.json is the SSOT for scenario thresholds previously hardcoded in structural_integrity_veto.py.
virtual_affinity_maturation.evolution_path: Project-level calibration of min_freq for CHECK 6 (default 0.005), vdW overlap thresholds for CHECK 8 (default 0.4 / 0.6 Å), or Stage 0 ipTM/PAE thresholds requires EVOLUTION_LOG [PROPOSAL] + owner sign-off before drift. Any deviation from Boltz-2 as Stage 0 primary requires logged license artefact for the alternative tool. V1.7 coordinate-system rules (CHECK 6 IMGT-segmented index; CHECK 7 PDB chain_records linear index) and the per-site WT-self MM/GBSA baseline are invariants; any reversion requires owner-approved EVOLUTION_LOG entry.

regular_antibody_vh_vl_humanization.rules_from_data: Executable thresholds in vh_vl_humanization_v490.json (_meta.version 5.5.1). V5.5.1 is a client-safe reporting patch for the V5.5.0 post-humanization paired Fv naturalness QC gate. Customer-facing outputs use Paired Fv Naturalness QC and show only PASS/WARN/FAIL plus recommended action; internal JSON retains p_abnativ2.paired_humanness and pairing_likelihood. Gate behavior remains: paired_humanness <0.70 = FAIL, 0.70-0.80 = WARN, >=0.80 = PASS, target >=0.83. This is final candidate QC, not a Phase 2 germline pre-filter. Inherits V5.4.3 Balanced CMC Polish and V5.4.0 structure-driven fallback.
regular_antibody_vh_vl_humanization.bidirectional_link: standard ；tier_1_data.*.standards  V4.7.x–V5.5.x；version_mapping.V5.5.1_VH_VL_Humanization.depends_on ；DeepFR-CTX/CMC and 9AA-CTX OAS-Assist datasets resolve through config/clinical_842_9mer_db.json and config/oas_human_9mer_v1.json.gz as recorded in standards_ssot.runtime_policies.murine_vhvl_humanization
regular_antibody_vh_vl_humanization.evolution_path: / EVOLUTION_LOG [OBSERVATION]/[PROPOSAL]/[EXECUTED]；/（ ABENGINECORE_GOVERNANCE）。DeepFR-CTX/CMC rescue gate and polish rules require owner approval before registry/SSOT drift.
regular_antibody_vh_vl_humanization.supersedes_note: V5.5.1 preserves V5.5.0 paired_humanness QC behavior and makes checklist/customer reporting client-safe.

vhh_humanization_path_a.rules_from_data: V5.0 (Owner-approved Evolution Log 2026-05-16): Five mandatory upgrades. (1) Template library is clinical-VHH only (90 VH3-SAFE synthetic templates DEPRECATED). (2) FR identity cutoff lowered 0.70 -> 0.65 (permissive 0.60 with audit log). (3) Hallmark decisions are CDR3-length + SAP/pI driven (FULL/PARTIAL/MINIMAL). (4) Non-Hallmark back-mutation requires IgFold/ABodyBuilder2 + SASA + CDR-distance + DeepFR-CTX 9-mer voting; dynamic Tier per template. (5) No-template fallback uses DeepFR-CTX-VHH 9-aa context voting from clinical_842_9mer_db.json (G/P/C hard-protected). V4.0 prescreen gates retained (CDR3 hard >=25aa, soft >=20aa; SAP hard >0.771, soft >0.714; pI hard >9.5). VHH42 / VHH68_CMC_Benchmark_v1.0 remain LOCKED active_reference.
vhh_humanization_path_a.bidirectional_link: version_mapping.V5.0_VHH_Humanization.depends_on tier_1; standards VHH_HUMANIZATION_DESIGN_STANDARD_V5.0; cross-references DeepFR-CTX shared with VH/VL humanization V5.5.x
vhh_humanization_path_a.evolution_path: EVOLUTION_LOG entry 2026-05-16 [APPROVED] documents the V4.0 -> V5.0 upgrade rationale and five-part change list.

de_novo_cdr_design.role: De Novo CDR Design & Patent Escape (FTO)
de_novo_cdr_design.rules_from_data: V5.2 (2026-05-01) alignment with VAM V1.6.1: Boltz-2 Stage 0 primary; mandatory CHECK 6 Fingerprint Prior (FH-358 for VH/VL, VHH-71 for VHH); short-peptide Scenario A dual gate (ipTM>=0.80 + PAE<5.0A); AF3 server prohibited for production. Inherits V5.1 Absci benchmark validation and PRODIGY prohibition.
de_novo_cdr_design.bidirectional_link: DE_NOVO_CDR_DESIGN_STANDARD.md §1.1 (AA Priors) and §2.4 (V1.6.1 alignment) define the mandatory use of Boltz-2 and Fingerprint Priors. Shared config/vam_antigen_profile.json ensures consistent thresholds across VAM and De Novo for the same antigen scenario.
de_novo_cdr_design.evolution_path: V5.2 enforces data-driven priors to constrain the massive de novo search space. Any deviation to Chai-1 or AF3 requires logged license confirmation.

vh_to_vhh_conversion_path_b2_c.rules_from_data: V1.8.17 (2026-05-16): Aligns SSOT + registry with VH_TO_VHH_CONVERSION_STANDARD_V1.8.md header V1.8.17. Stealth tier net_basic/pI-conditional (NONE/MINIMAL/STANDARD/FULL); Y91/F91 + W103 monitoring metrics (no mutation). Inherits V1.8.16 VL-safety SASA gate (50 Å² threshold; aa-type-aware hydrophobic check at k45). Inherits V1.8.8 Smart-CMC guards, adaptive pI-tuning (K73Q fallback), Path C2 CDR Cys-Gate (C100AS), V1.8.6 hallmark simplification + Expressibility Verdict Gate. Public API branch V1.8.17.IGHV3 = same rules + IGHV3-family-only pre-flight on /vh_to_vhh endpoints.
vh_to_vhh_conversion_path_b2_c.v1_5_addendum: V1.5 (2026-04-30) Risk-Forward Reporting： V1.4 （Verdict Headline / Risk Attribution Matrix / Success Probability / Action Roadmap）。V1.5.1 ： (Bahrami Dizicheh et al., 2023)  CDR3  FR2(37/47) ； Twist  Option B  Tetravalent VHH-Fc-VHH。；payload ， V1.4
vh_to_vhh_conversion_path_b2_c.v1_6_addendum: V1.6 (2026-04-30) Engineered VH Similarity Layer（§6.7）： Atlas-24 （atlas24_v1.0_2026-04-30，n=24  VH ）， engineered_vh_similarity（0–1）。：hallmark_motif(25%) + stealth_pattern(20%) + cdr3_charge(20%) + cdr_hydrophilicity(20%) + cdr3_envelope(15%)， 3  liability 。stealth_departures==0  score_band  medium + Risk Attribution INFO 。， V1.5 success_probability
vh_to_vhh_conversion_path_b2_c.v1_7_addendum: V1.7.1 (2026-04-30) Glycan-Dependent Epitope Risk Layer（§6.8）：：(1)  GLYCAN_CONTACT_AB_KB（v1.7.1_glycan_checker_2026-04-30）（Camrelizumab/PD-1 N58，Liu 2021，Li 2021），KB penalty_factor×0.45 (HIGH_RISK)；(2) CDR-H3  NxS/T （N[STAGCVILMPFYW][ST]）， penalty_factor×0.90 (INFO)。penalty_factor  success_probability  verdict_severity  primary_recommendation  —  V1.7 。：Camrelizumab  1.0  0.45（MODERATE_RISK）。：core/vh2vhh/glycan_dependency_checker.py。

crossspecies_engine.role: Engine-layer meta-standard for cross-species antibody engineering — three frozen tracks (SR-1.0 Surface Reshaping, DFR-1.0 DeepFR, AG-1.0 Anchor Graft) and the species adapter contract; parallel to (never replaces) species standards.
crossspecies_engine.config_execution: config/crossspecies_adapter_template.json + config/crossspecies_adapters/*.json + scripts/run_petization_pipeline.py (SR-1.0 / AG-1.0) + scripts/run_deep_freq_petization.py (DFR-1.0) + scripts/run_vhh_surface_reshaping_v1.py (SR-1.0)
crossspecies_engine.rules_from_data: Tracks frozen at V1.0. SR-1.0: SASA gate + germline-frequency replacement + hard locks (CDR / canonical Cys / Hallmark). DFR-1.0: SR-1.0 substitution gated by 4 structural vetoes — Hallmark / canonical Cys / SASA<5 Å² / CDR-proximal heavy-atom <5 Å. AG-1.0: CDR transplant onto clinically validated acceptor scaffold only (raw germline forbidden as acceptor). Forbidden engine-layer patterns: naive merged mutation union without three-gate re-screen (CMC degradation observed in anti-HSA VHH A6 benchmark, 2026-05-06: ADI 95→90.8, SAP 0.714→0.571); AG-1.0 on dog/cat VHH (no canine/feline single-domain clinical scaffold). 10 concrete adapters shipped with V1.0 covering dog VH/VL, dog VHH, cat VH/VL, cat VHH, camelid VHH→human, rabbit→human, mouse→human, chicken→human, bovine→human, equine→human.
crossspecies_engine.bidirectional_link: SSOT entry crossspecies_engine ↔ docs/CROSSSPECIES_ENGINE_STANDARD_V1.0.md ↔ version_mapping.V1.0_CrossSpecies_Engine. Engine standard is parallel to species standards; the species standard always wins on conflict.
crossspecies_engine.evolution_path: New tracks (e.g., constrained Merged-with-three-gate-rescreen) require [PROPOSAL] in EVOLUTION_LOG + owner approval before V1.1. Adding cross-reference paragraphs into LOCKED species standards requires per-standard approval (not implicit in V1.0).

pet_antibody_petization.version_semantics: release_id + version_label = frozen data cohort (scaffold JSONs + tier_3_data pointers); standard_version = governing markdown revision (V1.0.1 §2.4 Track A/B; V1.2.0 §3.5 FR4 / UP-FR4 + CLI --fr4-strategy; implementation petization_cli_v1.3.0).
pet_antibody_petization.rules_from_data: : dog_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier2_v1 (V1.1, 5 Tier1 VH + 3 Tier1 VL); : cat_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier2_v1 (V1.0.0, 86 VH + 62 VL); :  IgG1a/1b/IgG2 (NCBI ) + IGKC + IGLC1*01 (IMGT000038);  IgG-Bm + IGKC/IGLC;  CMC  §5。

feline_antibody_felinization.role: DEPRECATED — superseded by pet_antibody_petization (V1.0.0_Petization). Kept for historical traceability only.
feline_antibody_felinization.deprecation_note: All new feline runs MUST use pet_antibody_petization. This entry is preserved so archived projects produced before 2026-04-29 evening can still resolve their release_id.

cmc_developability_assessment.role: General antibody CMC/developability assessment, FR-only mutation suggestion policy, and regular VH/VL IgG cohort panel (origin-aware gates)
cmc_developability_assessment.config_execution: core/evaluation/evaluator.py + core/evaluation/cmc_advisor_module.py + core/cmc/fr_mutation_sites.py + core/cmc/cmc_mutation_policy.py + core/cmc/regular_ab_developability.py + api/routers/cmc.py + data/rules/cmc_mutation_policy_v1_2.json (multi-file policy bundle)
cmc_developability_assessment.rules_from_data: V1.4.0 (2026-05-15): Smart-CMC safety upgrade. (1) Mandatory aggregation-motif lookahead guard. (2) CDR-driven hydrophobic patch detection and suppression. (3) Adaptive pI/net_charge safe-zone trimming (p25-p75). (4) Integrated CDR Fingerprint metrics (all_cdr_gravy) for both VH/VL and VHH. Removed acid_density due to reference data absence. V1.3.2 adds §3H sdAb Cohort Panel.
cmc_developability_assessment.bidirectional_link: SSOT entry cmc_developability_assessment ↔ CMC_DEVELOPABILITY_STANDARD_V1.1.md V1.4.0 ↔ version_mapping.V1.4.0_CMC_Developability
cmc_developability_assessment.evolution_path: Changes to cohort gates, hard-gate parameter list, origin routing, protected-position thresholds, or client-reporting disclosure require owner approval and registry/SSOT bump.

sequence_delivery_standard.role: Unified sequence retrieval, assembly, codon optimization, and delivery QA workflow
sequence_delivery_standard.rules_from_data: Unified CHO-1.0 codon table; standardized SP+V+C assembly; multi-gate QA (diff/GC/stop/FR4).
sequence_delivery_standard.evolution_path: Changes to codon tables or sequence assembly QA require SSOT + registry update.

clinical_germline_anchors.name: Clinical Germline Anchors with ADA Risk Profiling (NEW V1.0) [2026-04-18]
clinical_germline_anchors.source_data: ada_master_136_curated.csv (138 antibodies with ADA immunogenicity data)
clinical_germline_anchors.binding_system: HumanizationEngine._clinical_anchor_candidates — for ranking germline candidates by clinical prevalence
standards: V4.7.2 VH/VL Humanization — Clinical Anchoring Architecture
clinical_germline_anchors.design_philosophy: germline，ADA/CMC/clinical。Not all 500 germlines; only 82 with clinical validation.
clinical_germline_anchors.usage_pattern: 1. Input murine sequence → 2. ANARCII numbering → 3. Query clinical_germline_anchors by family → 4. Rank by frequency + ADA risk match
clinical_germline_anchors.regeneration: Update when new ADA/clinical data becomes available; freeze current version as v1.0 baseline
clinical_germline_anchors.license: LOCKED — frozen; do NOT recompute from ada_master without explicit approval

vhh42_cmc_metrics.name: VHH42 Per-Sequence CMC Metrics (NEW V1.0) [2026-04-18]
vhh42_cmc_metrics.composition: 39 clinical VHH from vhh_39_clinical_atlas/master_table.csv + 3 Database-B chains from vhh42_sabdab_supplement.json
vhh42_cmc_metrics.binding_system: VHH humanization Phase 2 (template matching by CMC similarity), Phase 5 QC
vhh42_cmc_metrics.usage_pattern: For each new VHH design candidate, score CMC (pI, GRAVY, patches) against VHH42 distribution; flag outliers
vhh42_cmc_metrics.license: LOCKED — frozen reference; regenerate only if clinical VHH set materially changes
vhh42_cmc_metrics.notes: Mirrors 840-antibody CMC structure; enables CMC-informed VHH template selection

vhh_structural_microenv.name: VHH Structural Microenvironment Analysis (V0.1) [2026-04-19]
vhh_structural_microenv.usage_pattern: Provides 3D spatial evidence (SASA, 5A neighbors, CDR3-FR2 distance) for 68 VHH structures (39 clinical + 29 Database B). Used to validate Hallmark/Stealth rules.

vhh42_sap_thresholds.name: VHH42 SAP Three-Tier Thresholds (NEW V1.0) [2026-04-21]
vhh42_sap_thresholds.binding_system: VHH humanization Phase 4 (Surface Reshaping Trigger) and Phase 5 QC
vhh42_sap_thresholds.notes: Couples S1/S2/S3 strategies with physical SAP limits

vhh42_germline_assignments.name: VHH42 Human Germline Assignments (NEW V1.0) [2026-04-18]
vhh42_germline_assignments.composition: 39 clinical VHH from vhh_39_clinical_atlas/master_table.csv + 3 Database-B chains (Kabat segmentation via ANARCII) from vhh42_sabdab_supplement.json
vhh42_germline_assignments.binding_system: VHH humanization Phase 2 (template selection and ADA risk lookup)
vhh42_germline_assignments.design_philosophy: Link each VHH to closest human IGHV germline; enables ADA risk profiling and germline-based CMC anchoring
vhh42_germline_assignments.usage_pattern: For each new VHH, query top_human_germline to find ADA risk in clinical_germline_anchors

vhh42_germline_assignments.notes: Enables clinical germline anchoring for VHH (analogous to VH/VL humanization)

vhh42_sabdab_supplement.notes: Not clinical therapeutics; pairs with 39 clinical VHH so per-sequence artifacts match aggregate n=42 in VHH42_reference_stats_v1.json

vhh_fr3_packing_rules.name: VHH FR3 Packing Rule Framework (NEW V1.0) [2026-04-18]
vhh_fr3_packing_rules.binding_system: VHH humanization Phase 2 (template ranking by FR3 packing compatibility)
vhh_fr3_packing_rules.design_philosophy: Tier-weighted FR3 packing scoring (T1×3 + T2×2 + T3×1), analogous to VH/VL Vernier framework
vhh_fr3_packing_rules.usage_pattern: When ranking VHH templates, score FR3 packing similarity and prefer templates with higher scores (p75+)
vhh_fr3_packing_rules.license: LOCKED — frozen tier definitions; regenerate only if PDB structure set materially changes
vhh_fr3_packing_rules.notes: Provides unified framework for all antibody types (VH/VL + VHH)

vhh_fr3_packing_percentiles.qa_gates: WARN if FR3 packing < p25; FAIL if < p5
vhh_fr3_packing_percentiles.license: LOCKED — frozen benchmarks; regenerate only if clinical VHH set materially changes

IGLV.todo_v2: Full-sequence Kabat coverage requires ANARCI re-run on IGLV_aa.json in env anarcii

human_replacement_profiles_v1.binding_system: VH/VL humanization frequency gate; Llamanade-style position frequency lookup; petization scripts
human_replacement_profiles_v1.notes: VH table is NGS-empirical (strongest reference); VK/VL are germline-frequency priors. Do NOT mix NGS and germline tables in the same frequency gate without explicit scaling.

pet_replacement_profiles_v1.name: Pet (Dog / Cat) Amino-Acid Replacement Profiles — Kabat Position Frequencies v2
pet_replacement_profiles_v1.format: flat position_to_aa_fraction_v1 — identical schema to human_replacement_profiles_v1
pet_replacement_profiles_v1.binding_system: Petization (caninization / felinization) frequency gate for VHH and VH/VL surface humanization
pet_replacement_profiles_v1.license: REGENERATABLE — run scripts/build_pet_replacement_tables.py in conda env anarcii
pet_replacement_profiles_v1.notes: Cat tables use CMC-based weighting as proxy for in-vivo abundance (no published cat germline repertoire abundance data). Dog abundance data from published BCR-seq; CMC fallback applied where unavailable.

harmsen_2024_cross_species_sdabs.name: Harmsen et al. 2024 — Cross-species albumin/IgG-binding sdAbs (sequences + BLI affinities)
harmsen_2024_cross_species_sdabs.sequence_provenance: Supplementary Figure 1 — linear VHH parsed from spaced IMGT alignment (see scripts/parse_supplement_spaced_vhh.py)
harmsen_2024_cross_species_sdabs.affinity_provenance: Main text Table 3 (albumin KD), Table 4 (Fab/Fc KD)
harmsen_2024_cross_species_sdabs.binding_system: Half-life extension sdAb reference; dog/cat/horse albumin affinity lookup; petization context
harmsen_2024_cross_species_sdabs.license: Literature-derived — cite Frontiers article; sequences attributed to authors’ supplementary material
harmsen_2024_cross_species_sdabs.notes: Includes all 16 Supplementary Fig.1 clones plus BLI tables. T6T16A12 is a fusion construct (separate sequence in TeNT ref [41]). Re-run compare script against Data Sheet 1.pdf for PDF-vs-catalog cross-check.

cdr_numbering_and_segmentation.name: CDR Numbering & Segmentation (IMGT + Kabat Dual System)
cdr_numbering_and_segmentation.standards: V4.4 Phase 1.1 — CDR boundary strictly IMGT Union (H1: 26–38, H2: 55–65, H3: 105–117); Kabat used for FR/Vernier annotation only
cdr_numbering_and_segmentation.note: IMGT CDR definition is primary for humanization pipeline; Kabat used for germline selection scoring only

clinical_ada_reference.name: Clinical ADA Reference (Germline-Associated Historical ADA Rates)
standards: V4.7.1 Germline-ADA reference output contract — data_linkage_only, non_predictive
clinical_ada_reference.mandatory_boundary_tag: data_linkage_only: true, non_predictive: true in all reports
clinical_ada_reference.notes: ADA is clinical trial output; do NOT use as prediction model. Link by germline match only for historical context.

cat_iglc_imgt_v1.name: Cat IGLC1*01 lambda constant region (IMGT)
cat_iglc_imgt_v1.source: IMGT/GENE-DB IMGT000038, Felis catus Abyssinian, IGLC1*01 (Functional, 106aa)
cat_iglc_imgt_v1.notes: Replaces 2026-02 placeholder file (V-region masquerading as constant region). Other functional IGLC alleles (IGLC2/4/5/9) available from IMGT for multi-allele coverage if needed.

dog_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier.name: Dog scaffold CMC optimization tier1/tier2 registry
dog_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier.notes: 5 Tier1 VH (Cirevetmab/Izenivetmab/Lokivetmab/Bedinvetmab/Landogrozumab anchors) + 3 Tier1 VL; 4 Tier2 VH (Ranevetmab/Gilvetmab/etc.).

cat_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier.name: Cat scaffold CMC optimization tier1/tier2 registry
cat_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier.source: VH from NCBI Protein feline IGHV records (Kabat-normalized); VL from IMGT Felis catus IGKV (14) + IGLV (49)
standards: V1.0.1 Petization §2.4 (Track B full-feline Fv uses this registry for VH+VL)
cat_scaffold_cmc_optimization_tier1_tier.limitation: VH source is NCBI Protein, not IMGT germline reference; structural validation recommended before clinical use

structure_pdb_atlas.name: Structure PDB Atlas (840 Antibody Structural Benchmarks)
structure_pdb_atlas.content: PDB paths, VH-VL angles, RMSD statistics, packing angles for 840 engineered + natural antibodies
structure_pdb_atlas.use_case: Offline QC, clinical benchmarking, structural distribution analysis
structure_pdb_atlas.note: Planned consolidation: generate atlas_structure_summary.json as single query source

canonical_class_distribution.name: CDR Canonical Class Distribution (840 Antibodies)
canonical_class_distribution.current_status: H3/L1 have real distribution; H1/H2 are placeholders (all H1=H1-10-1, all H2=H2-16-?)
standards: V4.4 Phase 1.2 — North canonical class & 458 library structure matching
canonical_class_distribution.planned_action: Recompute H1/H2 North canonical from IMGT numbering; freeze as canonical_class_840_full.json

V5.5.1_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.5.1 preserves V5.5.0 post-humanization paired humanness QC behavior and patches checklist/customer reporting labels to be client-safe. Customer-facing outputs use Paired Fv Naturalness QC and show only PASS/WARN/FAIL plus recommended action. Internal JSON retains p_abnativ2.paired_humanness and pairing_likelihood. Supersedes V5.5.0_VH_VL_Humanization.

V5.5.0_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.5.0 adds post-humanization p-AbNatiV2 paired humanness QC gate. paired_humanness <0.70 = FAIL, 0.70-0.80 = WARN, >=0.80 = PASS, target >=0.83. The gate is applied after VH/VL assembly and may trigger deterministic repair or fallback germline/pair retry when available. It is not a Phase 2 germline pre-filter. pairing_likelihood remains auxiliary and has no 0.70 absolute threshold. Supersedes V5.4.3_VH_VL_Humanization.

V5.4.3_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.4.3 formalizes Balanced CMC Polish for DeepFR-CTX-CMC. Prioritizes ADI score maximization and clinical-range GRAVY (-0.5 to -0.2) over raw instability minimization. Rabbit M8b-B1 benchmark: ADI 87.05, GRAVY -0.34, Instab 38.2. Supersedes V5.4.2_VH_VL_Humanization.

V5.4.2_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.4.2 freezes DeepFR-CTX-CMC (display name; internal id deepfr_ctx_cmc) as a developability-optimized variant of DeepFR-CTX. It applies an FR-only CMC polish layer to minimize Instability Index and maximize ADI score. Rat Campath benchmark: ADI 63.69, Instab 46.7. Supersedes V5.4.1_VH_VL_Humanization.

V5.4.1_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.4.1 freezes DeepFR-CTX (display name; internal id deepfr_ctx) as the preferred balanced VH/VL humanization strategy. DeepFR proposes high-humanness FR substitutions; 9AA-CTX clinical/OAS guard-and-rescue keeps OAS-supported DeepFR residues and rolls back only hard structure/CMC vetoes to donor. Implementation entry point: core/humanization/ctx_guard.py::apply_deepfr_ctx. Rat Campath benchmark: DeepFR-CTX angle 86.3° (Δ -0.1° vs donor), RMSD 0.352 Å, ADI 60.02, ChgPatch7 2.1, FvAsym 2.918. Supersedes V5.4.0_VH_VL_Humanization.

V1.0_CrossSpecies_Engine.notes: V1.0 promoted from V0.1 by owner approval (' CrossSpecies Engine V1.0', 2026-05-07). Three frozen tracks: SR-1.0, DFR-1.0, AG-1.0. 10 concrete species adapters shipped (dog/cat VH-VL/VHH, camelid VHH→human, rabbit/mouse/chicken/bovine/equine→human). Cross-reference paragraphs into LOCKED species standards deferred to per-standard approval.

depends_on: WT complex PDB with antibody chains
protein antigen chains or hapten HETATM resnames
tools_registry.json entries for EvoEF2, ThermoMPNN, OpenMM MM/GBSA
V1.5.1_Virtual_Affinity_Maturation.notes: V1.5.1: Stage 2.5 CHECK 4 Antigen Contact Preservation Veto; HETATM-aware contact map; critical contact non-conservative substitutions trigger VETO_AFFINITY; candidate-scoped audit prevents cross-candidate mutation-key audit leakage.

V4.7.2_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: Standard file title: VH/VL  V4.7.2; includes V4.4 checklist + V4.5.x/V4.6.0/V4.7.x incremental revisions

V5.0.0_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.0.0: primary config config/vh_vl_humanization_v490.json (_meta.version 5.0.0); Phase 5 structural QC — per-CDR RMSD, global Fv RMSD, VH/VL angle gate, FR identity floors; deliverables omit 9-mer humanness proxy. Supersedes pipeline row V4.8.0_VH_VL_Humanization. SSOT alignment 2026-04-28.
V5.0.0_VH_VL_Humanization.deprecation_note: V5.0.0 used strict Chothia grafting (VH H1=26-32, H2=52-56), which silently humanized paratope-adjacent residues 33-35 / 50-51 / 57-65 (R5-307 case, 2026-05-01). Demoted to allowed_override; new runs MUST use V5.1.0 Union grafting.

V5.1.0_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.1.0: primary config config/vh_vl_humanization_v490.json (_meta.version 5.1.0). Strategy upgrade: Union (Kabat ∪ Chothia ∪ AbM) CDR grafting — VH H1=26-35, H2=50-65, H3=95-102; VL unchanged. P0 Bugfix: verify_cdr_preservation activated as HARD gate after Phase 4 assembly (replaces hardcoded cdr_integrity_check=True). Same Union ruler used for graft, BM forbidden region, CDR diff QA, and FR identity. Trigger: R5-307/Wemol cross-comparison (2026-05-01). Supersedes V5.0.0_VH_VL_Humanization.

V5.3.1_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.3.1 patch (2026-05-03): multi-species QA audit for rat/rabbit. (D1) Fix-A/B: progressive CDR-length tolerance (0→1→2→999) in _clinical_anchor_candidates + retry loop in _phase2_real for rat/rabbit — rabbit Kabat H2=22 aa (vs human ~5 aa) now triggers gate-skip at tol=999; rat matched at tol=0. (D2) 7 new V5.3 fields added to qc_metrics['framework_selection'] dict (duplicate phase2_degraded key removed). (D3) Fix-D: 7 new V5.3 fields plumbed from engine output into HTTP API payload. (D4) Fix-E: species-specific phase2_attention_message + red §0 banner on degraded fallback. (D5) Rabbit Phase 4.8 CDR integrity gate demoted from HARD ABORT to WARN for rabbit — Kabat H2 boundary mismatch is a known limitation; V5.4 will implement IMGT-based CDR grafting for rabbit. Rat result: IGHV3-72*01 selected (FR=74%, +4.2pp vs V5.3.0 IGHV3-23*01), framework CMC scan enabled. Rabbit result: IGHV2-70*01 selected (0 CMC liabilities), pipeline completes for first time. Supersedes V5.3.0_VH_VL_Humanization.

V5.3.0_VH_VL_Humanization.notes: V5.3.0 (2026-05-02): minor version bump combining (i) P0 algorithm bugfix, (ii) new strict back-mutation decision policy, (iii) full report-format overhaul with anti-distillation pass. (a) P0 Bugfix in core/humanization/engine.py::_apply_bm — insertion-code key mismatch silently dropped algorithm-decided AUTO_APPLY back-mutations on positions whose ANARCII numbering returned (pos,' ') instead of (pos,''); fix iterates over both ('','space') key forms; same fix applied in _audit_one. (b) Strict two-tier back-mutation decision policy — config/vh_vl_humanization_v490.json adds decision_mode field on every HC*/Vernier-T* hard- and soft-constraint rule (AUTO_APPLY = algorithm decides and applies; PENDING_HUMAN = surfaced for customer choice; AUTO_APPLY_IF_TRIGGERED = applied only when downstream signal fires). Engine emits structured bm_decisions_vh/vl, bm_pending_vh/vl, bm_decisions_audit. (c) New per-rule audit pass cross-checks every config rule against the final assembled sequence and tags one of {RULE_NOT_TRIGGERED, EXECUTED_AS_RULED, RULE_VETOED_BY_DOWNSTREAM, RULE_PENDING_HUMAN}. (d) Report format: §5 split into §5a Applied / §5b Pending review / §5c FR4 J-segment retemplating; §10 full-length sequences default-visible + FASTA copy block. (e) Anti-distillation client-facing pass — internal rule names, mask-scheme strings, threshold numbers in attention-block titles, and model name (AbLang2) are removed from rendered HTML; clinical-framework cohort label uses neutral wording. (f) §3 fallback joins selected germlines against the 842 clinical-framework reference cohort when curated precedents are missing. Inherits V5.1.0 — Union (Kabat ∪ Chothia ∪ AbM) CDR grafting boundary, verify_cdr_preservation HARD gate, clinical anchor germline frequencies, ADA association, Phase 5 structure QC. Trigger: R5-307 client delivery audit (2026-05-02) revealing AUTO_APPLY back-mutations were proposed but not applied. Supersedes V5.1.0_VH_VL_Humanization.

V2.0_VHH_Humanization.notes: Adds: clinical VHH template protocol (§3), CDR3-aware Vernier tier adjustment (§3.3), germline anchoring + FR3 packing scoring (§3.2a), surface reshaping trigger (§4)

V2.1_VHH_Humanization.notes: V2.1: IMGT 55 / Kabat 50 long-CDR2 boundary (split_regions); VHH42 per-sequence parity 42 rows; tier_1 vhh42_sabdab_supplement; optional vhh42_benchmark on humanize_vhh success path

V2.3_VHH_Humanization.notes: V2.3: Hallmark Auto-Correction, SAP-driven auto strategy, integrated NanoBodyBuilder2 modeling, relaxed QA thresholds.

V2.4_VHH_Humanization.notes: V2.4: Hallmark definition corrected to 3 positions (IMGT 44/45/47 FR2 only). IMGT 37 is CDR1, removed from hallmark set. IMGT 45 canonical default changed from R to A (97.6% clinical norm based on 42 approved VHHs). Tier 0 reduced from 7 to 6 positions.

V2.5_VHH_Humanization.notes: V2.5: ranking stability policy tiering (A/B/C/D) introduced for delivery decisions; short-board structural-risk guard remains active; report now includes policy recommendation with swap_risk-aware consensus guidance.

V2.7_VHH_Humanization.notes: V2.7 comparison build: deterministic rescue now treats structure / RMSD / mini-CMC evaluation failure as hard-gate failure; if a backup candidate is promoted, downstream report fields switch to the promoted lead only; original Top-1 SAP is suppressed unless recomputed for the promoted lead.

V2.8_VHH_Humanization.notes: V2.8 production release: (1) _get_score 0.0 falsy bug fixed; (2) QA flags carry explicit Rank-1 provenance notice when rescue promotes backup lead; (3) hallmark fallback logs explicit warning flag instead of silently reusing Rank-1 hallmarks; (4) checklist_status upgraded to WARN when all rescue candidates fail hard gates; (5) cdr_rmsd_empty treated as advisory, not hard-gate failure.

V3.0_VHH_Humanization.notes: V3.0 production release: (1) Feasibility Pre-screen Gate (_vhh_feasibility_prescreen) — CDR3/CDR1 length + SAP + Instability upfront check; (2) CMC Optimization Advisory §9 — rule-based offline service recommendations for Instability/SAP/CDR-RMSD; (3) VHH Surface Reshaping Script (scripts/run_vhh_surface_reshaping_v1.py) — §4 algorithm, IMGT coords, deterministic conservative substitution; (4) SAP_proxy added to _vhh_mini_cmc donor baseline.

V4.0_VHH_Humanization.notes: V4.0 activates VHH68_CMC_Benchmark_v1.0 reference values for VHH Path A pre-screening: CDR3 hard gate >=25 aa, CDR3 soft gate >=20 aa, SAP hard >0.771, SAP soft >0.714; pI hard >9.5 unchanged. AbNatiV/nanoBERT remain soft reference metrics, not hard FAIL gates.

V5.0_VHH_Humanization.notes: V5.0 (Owner-approved Evolution Log 2026-05-16): Structure-driven + DeepFR-CTX upgrade. Five mandatory changes: (1) Drop 90 synthetic VH3-SAFE templates, clinical VHH only. (2) FR identity cutoff 0.70 -> 0.65 (permissive 0.60 audit-logged). (3) Hallmark CDR3+SAP/pI decision tree (FULL/PARTIAL/MINIMAL preservation). (4) Mandatory IgFold/ABodyBuilder2 structure prediction + SASA + CDR-distance + DeepFR-CTX 9-mer voting drives dynamic Tier per template. (5) No-template fallback uses DeepFR-CTX-VHH 9-aa context voting from clinical_842_9mer_db.json (G/P/C hard-protected). V4.0 prescreen gates retained.

applies_to: Path C (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.0_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: Hallmark CDR3-length rules and Stealth mutation frequency derived from SAbDab-nano 138-entry database scan (vhh_database_summary v1.0). Rules are frozen; do NOT re-scan at runtime.

applies_to: Path C1 (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.3_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.3: Aligned with VHH Humanization V2.4. Hallmark set reduced to 44/45/47. IMGT 37 removed from mandatory camelization hallmarks to preserve CDR1 conformation.

applies_to: Path C1 (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.8.4_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.8.4 (2026-05-14): Formalizes AbNatiV Δ hard gate (-0.074), mandatory Hallmark for short/non-compact CDR3 (> 6.5 Å), and target pI 5.5-8.5 regulation. Validated against vhh_master_benchmarks_v1 (n=103).

applies_to: Path C1 (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.8_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.8 adds §2 Phase 4.5 pI Tuning & sdAb Adaptation (L18S, F68Y) plus Phase 5 Mandatory Structure QA with Radius of Gyration gate (13.0–15.5 Å). V1.7 glycan risk layer and V1.6 engineered VH similarity layer are preserved.

applies_to: Path C1 (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.7_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.7 Glycan-Dependent Epitope Risk Layer (§6.8): two-pathway detection — (1) Frozen KB GLYCAN_CONTACT_AB_KB (v1.7_glycan_checker_2026-04-30): Camrelizumab NSN/PD-1 N58 GlcNAc (Liu et al. 2021 Nat.Commun.; Li et al. 2021 Cell Res.), penalty_factor×0.60; (2) CDR-H3 tip NxS/T motif scan (N[STAGCVILMPFYW][ST], Kabat 95-106 mid-segment), penalty_factor×0.75 for unknown antibodies. Compound: 0.60×0.75=0.45 (risk_level=HIGH). Penalty multiplied into success_probability (post V1.5/V1.6); triggers verdict_severity and primary_recommendation upgrades — ONLY V1.7 change with decision impact. Trigger case: Camrelizumab 1.0→0.45 correction. Implemented in core/vh2vhh/glycan_dependency_checker.py. V1.5 and V1.6 layers fully preserved.

applies_to: Path C1 (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.6_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.6 Engineered VH Similarity Layer (§6.7): additive scoring layer against Atlas-24 frozen prior (n=24 published engineered human VH single-domain antibodies, atlas24_v1.0_2026-04-30). 5 scoring components (hallmark_motif 25% / stealth_pattern 20% / cdr3_charge 20% / cdr_hydrophilicity 20% / cdr3_envelope 15%) + 3 liability penalties. stealth_departures==0 gate forces score_band→medium and injects INFO row. V1.5 decision tree fully preserved. Known limitation: no glycan-dependent epitope penalty (corrected in V1.7).

applies_to: Path C1 (Conventional VH/VL to VHH Conversion)
V1.5_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.5 Risk-Forward Reporting: adds §0 Verdict Headline (color-coded severity + success_probability + primary_blocker + recommended_action), §1.5 Risk Attribution Matrix (5-column structured table with severity grades BLOCKER/WARN/INFO), §5.5 Action Roadmap (mandatory 3-option STOP/RESCUE/PROCEED decision tree). Algorithm decision tree inherits V1.4, but adds a Conformational Mismatch Risk penalty for long CDR3s lacking aromatic FR2 anchors (Kabat 37/47) based on Bahrami Dizicheh et al., 2023. Option B upgraded to Tetravalent VHH-Fc-VHH based on Twist Bioscience 2024. Payload extends V1.4 with: success_probability (float 0–1), confidence_band, verdict_severity, primary_blocker, primary_recommendation, risk_attribution[], action_roadmap. Backward-compatible: V1.4 clients can ignore new fields without parse errors.

V1.0.0_Petization.notes: Unified petization standard (dog + cat). Data cohort frozen under release_id V1.0.0_Petization. Standard document V1.0.1 adds §2.4 felinization Track A vs Track B (B default for new cat programs). V1.2.0 adds §3.5 FR4 (UP-FR4 defaults; CLI --fr4-strategy). Implements 3-track auto-routing (graft_vernier / surface_reshaping / deep_fr_anchor), Phase 1–7 pipeline, species-aware CMC (cat/dog × VH/VL-κ/VL-λ pI ranges + Met/Trp oxidation + CDR3 NG deamidation), internal-only API surface (/internal/petization/run, /internal/pet-console).

V1.0.0_Felinization.notes: DEPRECATED 2026-04-29 evening — superseded by V1.0.0_Petization. Original cross-species feline release retained for archival traceability.

V5.2_De_Novo_CDR_Design.notes: V5.2 (2026-05-01) alignment with VAM V1.6.1: Boltz-2 Stage 0 primary; mandatory CHECK 6 Fingerprint Prior (FH-358 for VH/VL, VHH-71 for VHH); short-peptide Scenario A dual gate (ipTM>=0.80 + PAE<5.0A); AF3 server prohibited for production. Inherits V5.1 Absci benchmark validation and PRODIGY prohibition.

V1.2_CMC_Developability.notes: V1.2 adds formal CMC Mutation Policy: FR-only automated suggestions, CDR advisory-only handling, surface-class routing, and structure-aware protection of CDR/interface-neighbor and buried-core positions.

V1.3_CMC_Developability.notes: V1.3 adds §3G regular VH/VL IgG cohort panel with origin-aware references, gate vocabulary, hard-gate parameters, and abenginecore_version 1.3.0 output stamp; supersedes V1.2 while retaining mutation policy JSON v1.2.

V1.3.1_CMC_Developability.notes: V1.3.1 activates VHH_CMC_v1.1 gates for VHH SAP_score and hydro_patch_max9 using VHH68_CMC_Benchmark_v1.0; regular VH/VL IgG V1.3 gates unchanged.

V1.4.0_CMC_Developability.notes: V1.4.0 (2026-05-15): Smart-CMC safety upgrade. (1) Mandatory aggregation-motif lookahead guard. (2) CDR-driven hydrophobic patch detection and suppression. (3) Adaptive pI/net_charge safe-zone trimming (p25-p75). (4) Integrated CDR Fingerprint metrics (all_cdr_gravy) for both VH/VL and VHH. Removed acid_density due to reference data absence.

V1.8.6_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.8.6 (2026-05-14): Algorithm simplification based on AutonomousHumanVH_Cohort_v1 (n=36, Kabat scheme). (1) K45R only default hallmark; K44E/K47F rescue-only (CDR3>=15 AND compactness>6.5A). (2) Stealth K-gate: positions 35/50/89/94 trigger only when original==K. (3) L18S disabled; F68Y only when K68==F. (4) Reverts V1.8.5 K50 R/K Natural Mimetic rule (coordinate misuse). (5) [NEW] Expressibility Verdict Gate: CDR3 length + compactness + AbNatiV Delta three-dimensional composite gate; FAIL sequences not publishable.

V1.8.8_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.8.8 (2026-05-15): Integration of Smart-CMC safety guards (aggregation-motif lookahead, CDR-driven hydrophobic patch detection) and adaptive pI-tuning (K73Q fallback). Supports Path C2 CDR Cys-Gate (C100AS). Inherits V1.8.6 algorithm simplification and Expressibility Verdict Gate.

V1.8.17_VH_to_VHH_Conversion.notes: V1.8.17 (2026-05-16): SSOT-aligned release id for VH→VHH conversion. Stealth tier net_basic/pI-conditional; structural audit CD3 Fv panel (ABodyBuilder2); Y91/F91 + W103 monitoring; inherits V1.8.16 SASA gate + V1.8.8 Smart-CMC/pI/Cys layers. Console/API deployment branch label V1.8.17.IGHV3 documents IGHV3-only gateway without changing algorithm rulebook.
